plist.dict:
CFBundleExecutable $(EXECUTABLE_NAME) CFBundleIdentifier $(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER) CFBundlePackageType APPL CFBundleVersion 1 NSHighResolutionCapable
NSMicrophoneUsageDescription This app uses the microphone for plugin audio input. LSApplicationCategoryType public.app-category.music APPICON_KEYS LSMinimumSystemVersion 13.0 NSPrincipalClass NSApplication
